name: provenance manifest standards_state freshness_at_generation accepts the four-value enum from the contract
command: printf '{"standards_state":{"x":{"content_hash":"a","fetched_at":"t","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check freshness-enum 2>out.txt && grep -q 'freshness_value=fresh-within-fetch-frequency valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
